---
title: "James Hay Mackenzie"
---

## James Hay Mackenzie

**Dates:** (d. 1865)

### Description

brother of Anne Mackenzie.

### Biography

He married Isabella Wedderburn (sister of Jemima Blackburn). His death prevents their being the Mr and Mrs J. Mackenzie referred to in 1866. [LG 1906; Burke Peerage 1949, Ogilvy-Wedderburn Bt.]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
